title: ADR-NNN <Decision Title>
type: adr-log
status: living
updated: YYYY-MM-DD
---

<!--
  This is a single ADR ENTRY, not a standalone file.
  Append it to docs/reference/decisions.md — do not create a new file for it.
  Number sequentially from the last ADR in that log.
-->

### ADR-NNN: <Decision Title>

- **Status:** proposed | accepted | superseded (→ ADR-MMM)
- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD

**Context:** What situation or problem prompted this decision. What forces were in tension.

**Decision:** What was decided, stated plainly and concretely.

**Consequences:** What this makes easier, what it makes harder, what follow-up work it implies.

**Alternatives considered:** Other options and why they were rejected.
